name: Sunnylife Global, Inc.
summary: Sunnylife Global, Inc. owns and operates hospitals in China. The company also builds and operates assisted living care centers for the elderly. It also develops and markets healthcare products, including supplemental vitamin and herbal-based products. The company was formerly known as Norsa, Inc. and changed its name to Sunnylife Global, Inc. in 2003. Sunnylife Global, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in West Covina, California.
